items.title: [正面] I got into this game because I like cosmic horror,...
items.summary: I got into this game because I like cosmic horror, but it is so much more. Not only is the story a great example of Lovecraftian-style cosmic horror, it manages to be engaging, and even though the translation is not always perfect, it is clear what they are saying and the art more than makes up for it. The main and side stories are fantastic, the visuals are gorgeous, the characters are interesting and the gameplay is really fun! It is one of those games that makes the characters (esp the female ones) kinda fanservice-y looking, but it never interferes with the story, and one of the chapters actually blends themes of sexuality and reproduction with horror really well. Could not recommend more.

items.title: [正面] Gameplay is great and the gacha is pretty lenient....
items.summary: Gameplay is great and the gacha is pretty lenient.  However the translation is pretty terrible (literally just a GPT AI translation), which makes it rought to play.  The Japanese mobile version is also completely separate from the PC version, so you can't share accounts, which is annoying.

items.title: [正面] Jogo de turno nichado, rico em gameplay, várias po...
items.summary:
Jogo de turno nichado, rico em gameplay, várias possibilidades de variação de comp. 
Arte perfeita.
Trilha sonora maravilhosa.
História 10/10, visual novel em forma de jogo.
Gacha generoso com boas probabilidades, todos os personagens acessíveis para f2p, e se vc acumular um pouco também consegue as cópias com facilidade.
Único ponto negativo é a tradução, mas é irrelevante, pois por mais que as frases ás vezes soem estranhas, o sentido não se perde, e as vezes também saem algumas engraçadas.
Recomendo
